Package de.uka.ilkd.key.util.rifl

RIFL is short for "Requirements for Information Flow Language", a tool-indepentent specification language developed in the RS3 project.

See: Description

  • Interface Summary 
    Interface Description
    SpecificationContainer
    Container for parsed RIFL specifications.
  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    DefaultSpecificationContainer
    Default implementation of SpecificationContainer.
    RIFLHandler
    XML content handler for the RIFL language.
    RIFLHandler.ErrorHandler  
    RIFLTransformer
    Facet class for interpreting RIFL specifications.
    SecurityLattice
    A lattice of security domains in RIFL.
    SimpleRIFLExceptionHandler
    Simple exception handler which just writes to standard output.
    SpecificationEntity
    Program elements which may be named as sources or sinks in RIFL/Java.
    SpecificationEntity.Field  
    SpecificationEntity.Parameter  
    SpecificationEntity.ReturnValue  
    SpecificationInjector
    Writes JML* translation of RIFL specifications to Java files.
    SpecificationInjector.JMLFactory
    Produces JML* respects clauses.
  • Enum Summary 
    Enum Description
    SpecificationEntity.Type  

Package de.uka.ilkd.key.util.rifl Description

RIFL is short for "Requirements for Information Flow Language", a tool-indepentent specification language developed in the RS3 project. The RIFL/Java dialect is documented in XXX. This package contains a transformer from input RIFL files (XML) and original Java files to JML* annotated files.
